TimeEntry.Title: Critical - BWH-HQ-VONEMemory Utilization is 92%, threshold value for this monitor is 90%Memory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes: This was a critical alert for high memory utilization on BWH-HQ-VONE. I remotely accessed the machine to investigate the issue and found that utilization was high due to unwanted applications running.

Worked on the assigned ticket.Login to the manage engine portal and check approved patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

TimeEntry.Title: urgent NEWSTAR Help
TimeEntry.Notes: Rosa reported that Newstar was down for all users. I connected to a user's computer and confirmed that the server was not reachable as I was unable to ping it. Newstar support shared an article detail

TimeEntry.Title: Adobe Acrobat
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the user's request, I connected to their machine to understand and troubleshoot the issue. I repaired Adobe Acrobat and changed the preference settings after reading various articles from Googl

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.17.18721.0 on BRA001 & BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-0
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that BRA001 & BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-0 needed updates. I updated both to version 7.17.18721.0

TimeEntry.Title: Critical - BWWS008-PC.brandywinedev.localMemory Utilization is 91%, threshold value for this monitor is 90%Memory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes: This was an alert from the OPS manager regarding high memory utilization on this device. I took remote control and checked the utilization, which I found to be normal. However, upon logging into the p

TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the assigned ticket.Login to the manage engine portal and check approved patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed 
the failed patches manually which are

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.17.18721.0)updated on machine:- BWLAP-18, BWWS003-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: As per task assign by Lead. Connected to the machi

TimeEntry.Title: BWH- Passportal syncing failed- Last Checkin : October 15, 2024 @ 3:19am
TimeEntry.Notes: While investigating Passportal, it was discovered that synchronization had failed, which impacted the update of user credentials and replication processes. To address this, I logged into the server DC

TimeEntry.Title: img-re1 has missed or failed patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes: I have assigned responsibility for this ticket to Abhishek in tech support to check and deploy failed or missing patches as shown in ticket details.    I also closed duplicate tickets rel

TimeEntry.Title: Systems did not contact agent from more then last 30 days
TimeEntry.Notes: I have assigned responsibility for this ticket in tech support to check and to check and verify the alert-related issue as shown in ticket details. I also closed duplicate tickets related to the same

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools BWH-HQ-VONE, BWH-HQ-VBR-01, BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Log in to the vCenter and check the following machines that need to upgrade the VMware tool on them. Go to the VM and initiate the upgrade of the VMware tool on the machine successfully. BWH-HQ-VONE,

TimeEntry.Title: Pon network scanning and PDF issues
TimeEntry.Notes: Scan to network failing on one folder. Fixed by updating network credentials. Opening PDF files took over 30 sec and sometimes over 1min. Likely caused by latest 24H2 update. Disabled enhanced protect

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.17.18721.0 on BWLAP-20,BWWS008-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: accessed the CrowdStrike portal and identified that   BWLAP-20,BWWS008-PC required an update to the latest version. Subsequently, I updated both to version 7.17.18721.0.

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - BWH-HQ-VONE.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BWH-HQ-VONE&nbs

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BWH-HQ-OPSPRB-01

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - BWH-HQ-APP-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BWH-HQ-APP-01

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam One is having some issue with esxi.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Veeam One server for BWH and then found some error on the VONE. Troubleshoot the issue with esxi and add them again. Setup alarms again for all the snapshots.

TimeEntry.Title: Removed machines from all the Technijian portals which were offline more than 30 days
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, removed machines from all the Technijian portals which were offline more than 30 days. Login into my remote portal and verified the machines that were offline more tha

TimeEntry.Title: Setup config management on OPS for client.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Ops manager portal and also logged into the BWH client network devices. Troubleshoot the disconnections issue on the devices. After that test the backups and it is working fine now.&nb

TimeEntry.Title: Pon needed additional Scan to network folder created.
TimeEntry.Notes: Set up the scan to folder remotely, but unable to test because we are not onsite. Emailed Pon to test when he gets in on Monday. Closing ticket for now and will re-open if further action is required.

TimeEntry.Title: Newstar server down
TimeEntry.Notes: Newstar server was not pingable, but were able to connect via MyRemote. Investigation found that there was a driver update for VMCI Bus driver that was pending installation. Applying this update broug

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Ticket 1223203 for Rick Wood
TimeEntry.Notes: Ran full hardware scan on Rick's PC. Backed up/imaged data then wiped PC and reinstall latest Win 11 24H2 image. Update latest patches and reinstalled all apps. Fixed Alex's PDF issue. Follow up with

TimeEntry.Title: Critical - BWWS029-PC.brandywinedev.localMemory Utilization is 92%, threshold value for this monitor is 90%Memory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the alert. Logged into the BWWS029 and verified. Memory Utilization is 92%, and the threshold value for this monitor is 90 % Device: BWWS029 and killed the unwanted process and memory is normal

TimeEntry.Title: Your archive mailbox is almost full.
TimeEntry.Notes: I received an email from Angela Meyer regarding a request to block a suspicious email. After checking and verifying the email, I found it was a legitimate alert from Microsoft, notifying the user that

TimeEntry.Title: Critical - BWWS029-PC.brandywinedev.localMemory Utilization is 91%, threshold value for this monitor is 90%Memory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes: I analyzed memory usage in Task Manager and identified multiple processes consuming significant memory. terminated the unnecessary processes, which brought the memory usage back to normal. Everything

TimeEntry.Title: Critical - BWws003-PC.brandywinedev.localMemory Utilization is 91%, threshold value for this monitor is 90%Memory Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the alert analyzed memory usage in the task manager. Found multiple processes consuming memory. Killed the processes that were not required, and memory usage came to normal. Hence closing
